entity.summary: Bitcoin-ecosystem decentralized exchange presenting itself as an EVM-compatible DEX settled on the Bitcoin network.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0343. The original bitzy.app domain redirects to bitzy.info. The current official page describes Bitzy as an EVM-compatible exchange on Bitcoin and states that swaps are decentralized and settled on Bitcoin, so HEI records a Bitcoin ecosystem origin rather than a legal country.

events.title: Bitzy recorded as Bitcoin ecosystem DEX
events.description: Bitzy is recorded as a Bitcoin-ecosystem decentralized exchange based on its CoinGecko source row and current official description of an EVM-compatible exchange settled on Bitcoin.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise mainnet launch event when stronger dated official material is available.

evidence.title: Bitzy original domain reference
evidence.notes: Original official domain. It redirected to bitzy.info during the 2026-06-20 review.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitzy
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0343.

evidence.title: Bitzy official Bitcoin DEX page
evidence.notes: The official page describes Bitzy as an EVM-compatible exchange on Bitcoin and says swaps are decentralized and settled on the Bitcoin network.
